config.reproduce: LLM_PROVIDER=ollama OLLAMA_MODEL=qwen2.5:7b EMBED_PROVIDER=local python scripts/bench_factcon.py --qpc 100 --tenet-read decompose --keys heuristic
config.scoring: MAB official SubEM (normalize + substring + max-over-golds), verbatim
config.note: BOUNDED reproduction, not the full n=100/cell (n=800) the docs describe — session wall-clock, not $ cost, was the constraint (LLM_PROVIDER=ollama is $0 either way; a full qpc=100 attempt was in progress and reached 60/100 on one cell before the harness reclaimed the background task at ~27 min). qpc truncates to the FIRST N questions per cell in dataset order (scripts/bench_factcon.py), not a random subsample — so this is not guaranteed to be an unbiased spot-check of the full 100.

provenance: Re-run 2026-07-16 to backfill the missing standalone evidence artifact for the 86.5 SH / 30.2 MH claim already published in README/BENCHMARK.md/COMPARISON.md since commit f6a0ac0 (2026-07-07); no raw per-question output from that original run was found in the repo, docs_scratch/, experiments/, or data/bench_runs.jsonl, so this is a fresh, same-config reproduction, not a recovered original artifact. Cost: $0 (LLM_PROVIDER=ollama, local qwen2.5:7b; EMBED_PROVIDER=local; --keys heuristic is zero-LLM ingestion) — DashScope was never called for this run.

published_claim.source: README.md, docs/BENCHMARK.md section 6, docs/COMPARISON.md (since commit f6a0ac0, 2026-07-07)

discrepancy_note: MH pooled (32.5% [20.1,48.0], n=40) is CONSISTENT with the published 30.2% [26.0,34.9] (n=400) — well within this run's wide CI. SH pooled (70.0% [54.6,81.9], n=40) is LOWER than the published 86.5% [82.8,89.5] (n=400); 86.5 sits just outside this run's 95% CI upper bound (81.9). At n=40 per axis (10x smaller than the published n=400) the CI is wide and the qpc truncation is non-random (see config.note), so this is flagged as a real but UNRESOLVED discrepancy, not a confirmed correction of the published number — reported honestly per this task's instructions rather than silently kept unverified or silently overwritten on an under-powered sample. Recommend a full --qpc 100 run (all 8 cells, ~2-3h wall-clock on local ollama, $0) to resolve which number is right.
